/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow -Woverloaded-virtual -Wnon-virtual-dtor -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -O2 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=26.1 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/db_wal_bench.dir/db_wal_bench.cc.o -o db_wal_bench  ../libmwal.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libbenchmark.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libbenchmark_main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libzstd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbenchmark.a
